prompt:
Goal: Create a premium brand hero board for a modern Oriental mooncake dessert gift brand named 望月甜造, with the English subtitle MOONLIGHT SWEET ATELIER, inspired by moon phases, quiet moonlight, tea culture, and luxury Mid-Autumn gifting.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 commercial poster, dark navy and warm gold palette, elegant high-end food photography blended with refined graphic design. Use cinematic low-key lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic textures, soft moon glow, and a luxurious editorial product-advertising composition.

Layout: Top-left typography block, large Chinese brand title in refined serif calligraphy, English subtitle beneath it, then the slogan 把月光，做成一份甜。. Add a small line of descriptive copy below: “现代东方月相甜点品牌商品化提案”. Include exactly 4 small circular feature badges under the copy, labeled: 1) “月相灵感”, 2) “低糖轻奢”, 3) “茶配甜点”, 4) “中秋限定”. Put a tiny top label reading “品牌主视觉 / BRAND HERO BOARD”. Add a thin footer band at the bottom with small brand-system text and a round seal logo.

Main scene: On a dark marble tabletop, show an open luxury mooncake gift box in deep midnight blue with gold edging. Inside the box are exactly 6 round mooncakes in individual square compartments: 1 black mooncake with gold flakes, 1 pale cream mooncake with a crescent motif, 1 golden yellow mooncake, 1 ivory mooncake, 1 dark brown mooncake, and 1 light beige mooncake with subtle marbling. Each mooncake should look like a refined modern dessert rather than a traditional red-gold pastry.

Packaging details: Behind the open box, place the upright matching gift box lid in navy leather-like texture with gold speckled star dust, five moon phase symbols across the front, the brand name 望月甜造, and the English subtitle below. Add a hanging oval tag and tassel on the right side of the box, with the text “月见定”.

Foreground food details: In front of the box, place exactly 2 cut mooncake pieces on a dark stone serving plate: 1 black mooncake half with glossy dark filling and 1 golden mooncake half with flowing caramel-colored filling. Add a slim gold dessert fork beside them and a tiny gold rabbit figurine nearby.

Surrounding props: Include exactly 5 supporting table props: 1 glass teapot filled with amber tea on the left, 1 white round plate partially visible at the far left, 1 dark lidded teacup on a wooden saucer to the right, 1 small white teacup with tea at the bottom right, and 1 navy invitation card with moon phase graphics and gold lettering near the cup. In the background, show a large blurred full moon and soft silhouetted branches, creating a poetic night garden atmosphere.

Visual style: Premium Chinese luxury dessert branding, dark navy, champagne gold, warm amber highlights, realistic product photography, delicate gold foil, marble texture, soft reflections, elegant serif typography, poetic Mid-Autumn mood. Avoid cartoon styling, avoid bright red traditional packaging, avoid clutter, keep the design clean and sale-ready.
